news.title: 美联储缩表新思路！洛根提议
替代收紧流动性
news.desc: 达拉斯联储主席洛根表示，美联储可通过调整监管规则降低银行对准备金的需求，从而实现资产负债表收缩，无需回到
模式，为QT路径提供新思路。

news.title: The Fed's Balance Sheet: Reserve Scarcity, QT Strategy, and TGA Volatility
news.desc: New Fed research estimates reserves plus ON RRP of ~$2.3T would approach September 2019 scarcity levels. The TGA ($850B target) remains highly volatile due to debt ceiling dynamics, posing ongoing liquidity risks.

news.title: The Central Bank Balance-Sheet Trilemma (Fed Notes)
news.desc: Federal Reserve staff note analyzes the trilemma between balance sheet size, reserve adequacy, and liquidity conditions. Between Dec 2005 and Dec 2025 the Fed's balance sheet grew from ~$800B to ~$6.5T; supply-demand shifts in reserves can create sudden liquidity stress.
